headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills opened the season with Super Bowl aspirations.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills hang on for 34-31 wild-card win over Dolphins

events.name: New York Giants at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — First-year head coach Brian Daboll had his upstart team fully prepared. Daniel Jones played at a level well beyond his experience.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants outlast Vikings 31-24 for 1st playoff win in 11 years

headlines.description: — The ball went right to Sam Hubbard, and the defensive end took off down the field. All the way down the field in his hometown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hubbard's 98-yard fumble return lifts Bengals over Ravens
